text: milk may be started from 4 weeks of age. /c63Infants fed animal milk should receive supplements of iron and vitamin C. /c63About 120-180 ml of milk should be fed with one teaspoon of sugar per feed, 6-8 times over the day. /c63While reconstituting the infant formula, the instructions given on the label should be strictly followed. /c63The feeds should be prepared and given using a sterile cup, spoon, bottles and nipples taking utmost care. /c63Overfeeding should be avoided in artificially-fed infants to prevent obesity. /c63Low-cost home-made complementary foods should be preferred. WHAT SHOULD BE DONE IF BREAST-MILK IS NOT ADEQUATE? 32 POINTS TO PONDER COMPLEMENTARY FOODS Rice ... 35 g Green gram dhal ... 10 g Leafy vegetables ... 2 t. sp Fat ... 2 t. sp Cumin (jeera) Method :Clean rice
